prestazioni: Engine swap to 1GD-FTV 2.8L turbo-diesel (from Hilux/Fortuner) with BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust by HKS, and Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel mapping and boost control (targeting 300 HP and 600 Nm torque)

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-level adjustable damping, custom valving for the Innova Crysta's 2750mm wheelbase, and reinforced top mounts by Cusco for improved handling and weight transfer
AP Racing 6-piston front brake calipers (from Lexus RC F) with 380mm two-piece rotors, braided stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge, and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for high-temperature performance
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (custom-fitted for Innova Crysta) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts, paired with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap
Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x9.5 ET30 wheels with 255/35R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, custom spacers by 5Zigen for aggressive flush fitment, and titanium wheel bolts by H&R

Custom carbon fiber hood with functional vents (for turbo cooling) by Seibon, LED headlight upgrade with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs, and rear LED taillight conversion by VLand with sequential turn signals
